laws.title: Corrections and Amendments to Spelling and Nomenclature
laws.description: Corrigenda to the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 (6 of 2014) to correct typographical errors, spellings of districts, and names of cooperative societies and corporations.
laws.simpleExplanation: This document acts as a formal correction sheet for the original Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act. It fixes spelling mistakes for places (like changing 'Rangareddi' to 'Ranga Reddy') and updates the official names of several government-run societies and corporations to ensure legal accuracy.

relatedSections.description: Corrects the names of various backward class cooperative societies and corporations listed in the original schedules.
